query:
-- Get variant IDs and check pricing
SELECT 
  v.id,
  v.variantCode,
  v.variantName,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL2,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL3,
  vp.sellingPriceRmbIncTax
FROM product_variants v
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON v.id = vp.variantId
WHERE v.variantCode IN ('DC-001-B004', 'DC-001-B003', 'DC-001-B002', 'DC-001-B001')
ORDER BY v.variantCode DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute 
-- Get variant IDs and check pricing
SELECT 
  v.id,
  v.variantCode,
  v.variantName,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL2,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL3,
  vp.sellingPriceRmbIncTax
FROM product_variants v
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON v.id = vp.variantId
WHERE v.variantCode IN ('DC-001-B004', 'DC-001-B003', 'DC-001-B002', 'DC-001-B001')
ORDER BY v.variantCode DESC;
